# UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES
## Periodic Transaction Report

**NAME:** Rohit Khanna

**OFFICE TELEPHONE:** 202-225-2631

- [X] Member of the U.S. House of Representatives — State: CA, District: 17
- [ ] Officer or Employee — Employing Office: (blank)

File an original and 2 copies

**Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering?** Yes [ ]  No [X]

*If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance.*

**Please indicate whether this is an initial report or an amended report.**
- [X] Initial Report
- [ ] Amendment (For amendments, please provide the date of the report you are amending. Date of Report Being Amended: ______)

*A $200 penalty shall be assessed against anyone who files more than 30 days late.*

(For Official Use Only) — initials "MC"; date stamp: 2019 APR 11 PM 12:13; "HAND DELIVERED"

The transaction grid contains only the pre-printed greyed Example row ("Example: Mega Corp. Common Stock", JT, Sale X, 02/05/2015, 03/07/15) — ignored. Actual transactions: "Please see the attached".
